indicators.name: white desk with lamp
indicators.rationale: The desk and lamp are not suitable for sleep, as they are intended for work or study.

indicators.name: white stool
indicators.rationale: The stool is not suitable for sleep, as it is too small and uncomfortable.

indicators.name: white radiator
indicators.rationale: The radiator is not suitable for sleep, as it is too cold and noisy.

indicators.name: white floor
indicators.rationale: The white floor is not suitable for sleep, as it is too cold and slippery.

indicators.name: white walls
indicators.rationale: The white walls are not suitable for sleep, as they are too cold and bare.

indicators.name: white furniture
indicators.rationale: The white furniture is not suitable for sleep, as it is too cold and uncomfortable.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not suitable for sleep (Primary). The white desk, stool, radiator, floor, walls, and furniture are all too cold and uncomfortable, making them unsuitable for sleep. The presence of a desk and lamp suggests a work or study environment, further undermining the suitability for sleep.
